title: 2-Year Treasury Yield Daily Observation
summary: FRED data snapshot shows the 2-Year Treasury Yield at 3.79% as of 2026-04-08, down 2 basis points from the prior day's 3.81%. The yield has oscillated between 3.79% and 3.84% over the past week.
key_points: Recent range: 3.79% to 3.84% over observations from 2026-04-02 to 2026-04-08
No accompanying analyst commentary or policy signals in source
Data represents raw market yield observation only
